extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai attacked with 2.5km to go on Falls Creek, dropped all WorldTour rivals except HOWSON Damien and amateur BERWICK Sebastian who led out the sprint.
tactical_patterns: Mitchelson-Scott reeled back all breakaway moves at 13km out, controlling tempo until Hindley's decisive 2.5km attack.
BERWICK Sebastian (Nero Continental) survived WorldTour selections and led sprint, suggesting domestic Continental riders merit closer pre-race assessment.
MORTON Lachlan's big-gear attack mid-climb immediately drew chase response, revealing he lacks acceleration surprise despite alternative race fitness.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: dropped early on Falls Creek despite pre-race favorite status, significant form deficit versus Vuelta-winning baseline
rider_signals.HOWSON Damien: positive: matched Hindley's 2.5km attack and finished second, showing Sunweb had dual cards despite Hindley taking leadership
rider_signals.BERWICK Sebastian: positive: only non-WorldTour rider in final selection, led out sprint showing Continental riders can survive 15km climbs at WT intensity
rider_signals.MORTON Lachlan: neutral: ultra-endurance base translated to strong mid-climb attack but lacked acceleration to stay clear of organized chase
